message:
fix: convert implicit format captures to explicit args in prop_assert macros (Rust 2024)

Rust 2024 edition does not allow format_args! to capture variables
when the format string comes from a macro expansion (prop_assert!,
prop_assert_eq!). Convert all {var} implicit captures to explicit
format arguments ({}, var) across 14 files (6 src + 8 test files).

Also includes previously uncommitted proptest properties for
disjoint_intervals.rs that had the same format capture issue.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
